'''Green glie''' was a [[Plant/Legends|plant]] which grew in deep [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]. It spread very quickly and was eaten by [[Ollopom/Legends|ollopom]]. It choked out other [[swamp mold]]s and was related to [[red glie]].

Green glie, when refined with certain other chemicals, could be used to make a number of dangerous and potent [[Poison/Legends|poisons]], effective on [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Near-Human]]s. The poisons were particularly effective because they were tasteless and odorless. On [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], after the underworld discovered this fact, glie poisons became part of their secret arsenal. Some [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] were known to purchase the substances on that world for use in their trade.

The Jedi [[Keiran Valn]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a successful assassination attempt with a poisonous compound derived from green glie.
